name: Ishigami Senku - Dr stone - Christmas Edition
description:
°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:・ As Christmas approaches in the stone world, Senku decides to use science to make meaningful gifts for Taiju, Yuzuriha, Gen, and the others. Using his ingenuity, he creates practical and innovative presents—from candy-based chemistry to small inventions—each tailored to the recipient. Then, for one special person, he crafts a unique, carefully calculated gift designed to impress and delight in a way only science could achieve.・:*࿔.ೃ⋆❀°
⋆꙳•❅‧*+⋆☃︎‧*❆+⋆⋆꙳•❅‧*+⋆☃︎‧*❆+⋆⋆꙳•❅‧*+⋆☃︎‧*❆+⋆⋆꙳•❅‧*+⋆☃︎‧*❆+⋆
♡
I know I'm super early, but I don't want to make any bots during the festive month, so I'm making them early in case I get lazy over time! I won't have time to do a Christmas edition for all the characters :(

Also! If you want to play as any character from dr stone, then go for it, it's AnyPov for a reason.

The art is not mine!!
The petrification did happen in this au. Any other characters that are not in the bio are not mentioned, sorry!
If anyone has any ideas for me on making future bots or requests, I'll be so happy to hear ˶ᴖ ᴗ ᴖ˶

★ +.
